name: V26.5.0
body:
### New Features and Improvements

- **Cell comments (`Comment`, `CommentCollection`)** — add, edit, and remove cell notes with author, text body, visibility flag, and pixel dimensions; serialized to `xl/comments{N}.xml` and VML drawing parts
- **Embedded pictures (`Picture`, `PictureCollection`, `ImageType`)** — embed images from byte arrays, `InputStream`, or file paths with two-cell anchor positioning; automatic JPEG/PNG/GIF/BMP format detection from magic bytes
- **Embedded charts (`Chart`, `ChartCollection`, `ChartType`)** — read chart name, type, anchor position, and extent; charts loaded from XLSX are preserved verbatim across load/save via raw XML round-trip; 21 standard chart types can be created programmatically via `ChartCollection.add(ChartType, dataRange, ...)` using generated OOXML (ChartEx types are not yet supported for creation)
- **Excel tables (`ListObject`, `ListObjectCollection`, `ListColumn`, `ListColumnCollection`, `TotalsCalculation`, `TableStyleType`)** — create structured tables from coordinate or A1-style ranges; configure display name, header/totals rows, 68 built-in table styles, column totals functions, and auto-filter visibility; serialized to `xl/tables/table{N}.xml`
- **Drawing shapes (`Shape`, `ShapeCollection`, `AutoShapeType`)** — add, retrieve, and remove drawing objects anchored to worksheet cells; 35 preset DrawingML geometries (rectangles, ellipses, arrows, stars, connectors, and more); loaded shapes with unsupported or complex raw XML (e.g. group shapes) are preserved verbatim across load/save
- **Freeze panes** — `Worksheet.freezePanes(row, col, freezedRows, freezedCols)` and `freezePanes(cellName, ...)` freeze rows and/or columns; `unFreezePanes()` clears the freeze; `isFrozen()`, `getFreezedRows()`, `getFreezedCols()` inspect current state; serialized as `<sheetView>` pane and selection elements
- **Workbook protection (`WorkbookProtection`)** — lock workbook structure, windows, and revisions with separate passwords; exposed via `Workbook.getProperties().getProtection()`
- **Workbook view (`WorkbookView`)** — read and write window position (`xWindow`, `yWindow`), size (`windowWidth`, `windowHeight`), active tab, scroll bar visibility, sheet tab visibility, tab ratio, and minimized state; exposed via `Workbook.getProperties().getView()`
- **Calculation properties (`CalculationProperties`)** — read and write calculation mode (`auto`, `manual`, `autoNoTable`), reference mode (`A1`, `R1C1`), `fullCalculationOnLoad`, iterative calculation settings (`iterate`, `iterateCount`, `iterateDelta`), and `fullPrecision`; exposed via `Workbook.getProperties().getCalculation()`
- **`Worksheet` additions** — `getComments()`, `getPictures()`, `getShapes()`, `getCharts()`, `getListObjects()` are now exposed on every worksheet
- **Unit test suite** — added `src/test/java/com/aspose/cells_foss/unit/` containing focused unit tests for Comments, Pictures, Charts, ListObjects, NumberFormat, CalculationProperties, and AutoFilter sub-types
- **Error cell values (`CellValueKind.ERROR`)** — error values such as `#N/A`, `#VALUE!`, `#REF!` are now loaded, stored, and saved with the correct `t="e"` cell type attribute; formula cells that cached an error result are also preserved
- Sheet relationship XML is now fully general: supports hyperlinks, table parts, comments, and VML drawing parts in a unified `buildSheetRelsXml` format

name: V26.4.0
body:
Initial public release of Aspose.Cells FOSS for Java, a Java 17 XLSX-focused spreadsheet library.

### Highlights

- Added a public spreadsheet API under `com.aspose.cells_foss` for creating, loading, modifying, and saving Excel `.xlsx` workbooks
- Added workbook and worksheet operations including add/remove/rename flows, active sheet selection, and visibility control
- Added cell value support for strings, numbers, booleans, date/time values, and formulas
- Added formatting support for fonts, borders, fills, alignment, number formats, and cell protection flags
- Added row and column sizing, hiding, and outline grouping support
- Added worksheet view settings, merged cells, defined names, hyperlinks, data validation, conditional formatting, auto filters, page setup, and worksheet protection
- Added document property handling plus persistence for supported workbook `workbookPr` attributes
- Added load diagnostics, repair reporting, and preservation paths for unsupported package parts during supported load/save flows
- Added OOXML packaging, XML mapping, and XLSX serializer infrastructure inside the repository
- Added scenario-based JUnit 5 coverage with Apache POI compatibility checks in `test` scope only
- Added user-facing documentation in `README.md` plus contributor guidance in `AGENTS.md`

### Supported Scope

- Load formats: `AUTO`, `XLSX`
- Save format: `XLSX`
- Runtime target: Java 17
- Build tool: Maven
- Packaging: `jar`
- Maven coordinates: `com.aspose:cells-foss:1.0.0`

### Known Limitations

- Save support is currently limited to `.xlsx`
- The library stores and round-trips formulas, but it is not presented as a full calculation engine
- Workbook-level wrapper APIs for protection, view, and calculation settings are not fully exposed yet
- Some APIs are primarily intended to preserve OOXML metadata and package fidelity rather than full Excel feature parity
